title: Origins: Tiltkin
description: An alcohol brewing themed Origin for the Origins Mod. Tiltkin are more than mere brewers; they are crooked caretakers of The Tilted Tavern, a lopsided pocket of reality where the ale is strong and the shadows stronger.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VQHmx_fHSM0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/k6S3zzWImxg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This data pack is designed for the Origins mod.**

[This Origin was suggested by **uzunuro** on Discord. If you would like to suggest your own data pack, you can do so over on my Discord server as well.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)

**Tiltkin:** Tiltkin are more than mere brewers; they are crooked caretakers of The Tilted Tavern, a lopsided pocket of reality where the ale is strong and the shadows stronger. Their domain is a place of slanted hearths and tilted morals, where every mug runneth over; sometimes with things that shouldn’t be drunk. The air hums with half-remembered drinking songs, and the chandelier sways to a wind that doesn’t exist.

**Impact:** 🟢

**🟩 The Grinning Threshold [Primary]:** You open the Grinning Threshold, its hinges stretching like a cat’s yawn, and step into your Tilted Tavern, dragging those nearby along with you. The floor greets you with a familiar slant, the firelight flickering in ways that defy geometry.

**🟩 Last Call [Primary + Sneak]:** With a resonant clunk, the Tavern firmly escorts all patrons out. Those who resist find their legs moving on their own, stepping through the door as if carried by an unseen tide.

**🟩 Tiltkin’s Keg [Secondary + Sneak]:** A Tiltkin’s Keg seeps from the darkness, its wooden ribs creaking like a waking beast. The Tiltkin’s Keg, as the name implies, is your brewing crucible; check your advancements to see what brews you can concoct.

**🟢 Iron Liver:** Poisons? Mere seasoning. Curses? They glide off you like rainwater. Your blood is half-distilled already, and your veins hum with the Tavern’s defiance.

**🟢 Swift as a Pouring Tap:** You move with the liquid ease of a spilled drink, the very air parting for you like patrons before a brawl. Stairs tilt to meet your feet, and doors creak open just in time.

**🟢 Tavern’s Warmth:** The hearth’s glow mends wounds and soothes aches; though those who linger too long start forgetting why you would ever leave.

**🟡 The Walls Have Teeth:** The Tavern tolerates no violence. Blades dull mid-swing, spells fizzle like damp fuses, and those who strike the bar find their hands stuck fast to the wood. The shadows bite back.

**🔴 The Coven’s Tab:** Brew past midnight, and the hagged patrons you’ve stolen clients from send their debt collectors: ghostly cats with eyes like frozen lanterns. You cannot blink, cannot brew, and can barely even look away until they’re... dealt with, yowling back into the dark.

**🔴 The Host’s Hands:** Your fingers were made for pouring, not punching. Your strikes land as softly as a cork dropped in sawdust; though the Tavern might lend a hand if you’re clever with a bottle.

**🔴 The Vanishing Latch:** After taking damage, the Threshold hiccups shut for 15 seconds. It’ll return, once it’s finished laughing at you.


<details>
<summary>🍺 Alcohol System Framework 🍺</summary>

Players can have up to three different alcohols active at once.
- The level of drunkenness depends on how many alcohols are currently active.
- Drinking a fourth alcohol is blocked.
- Attempting to drink a duplicate of an already active alcohol is also blocked.

Sobering up from any level of drunkenness will trigger a hangover.
- Sleeping automatically clears all active alcohols and immediately causes a hangover.

Drinking milk removes all drunkenness and even cures hangovers, but at a cost:
- It will apply the "Sour Stomach" debuff, inducing hunger for 15 seconds.

# Tipsy
**Description:** The world sways like a drunkard’s lullaby.

**🟡 Honeyed Haze:** Pale gold bubbles escape your lips; harmless, but marking you as the Tavern’s guest.

**🟡 The Telltale Hiccup:** A faint hiccup betrays you in the silence.

**🔴 Slanted Sight:** The edges of your vision ripple, as if reflected in a disturbed ale.

**🔴 The Floor’s Whisper:** Your footing drifts slightly, as though the ground sways beneath you.

# Drunk
**Description:** Reality is just a suggestion you agreed to earlier.

**🟡 Cinder’s Whisper:** Frequent orange-red bubbles trail your lips, glowing like dying coals.

**🟡 Bartender’s Interruption:** Your speech breaks into frequent, echoing hiccups.

**🔴 The Hearth’s Gaze:** The world bends like wax near a flame; edges warp, doors stretch unnaturally.

**🔴 The Sailor’s Shame:** Your footing slips a storm-tossed ship; movement gains unpredictable momentum.

# Blackout
**Description:** The Tavern sings, and you’re just the instrument.

**🟡 The Drunkard’s Chorus:** Hiccups wrack your body near-constantly, each one echoing like a misplayed note. 

**🟡 The Hag’s Sigh:** Your breath spills a swirling purple-pink mist, thick as stolen wine.

**🔴 Butterfingers:** A 5% chance to fumble items when used, as if the Tavern itself plucks at them.

**🔴 Jester’s Leading Step:** Your body lurches violently, as if the floor tilts by whim. 

**🔴 The Backwards Waltz:** Your limbs rebel; left is right, forward is backward. 

**🔴 The Curtain’s Fall:** Your vision cuts out without warning, plunging you into momentary darkness. 

**🔴 The Melted Chandelier:** Reality drips like tallow, walls slumping into impossible shapes. 

# Hungover
**Description:** The Tavern always collects its due; in memories, or in pounding regret.

**🔴 Molasses Marrow:** Your limbs move through thick air, each step an effort.

**🔴 The Coven's Tax:** Your body rebels, your vitality lowered, as if something vital was drunk in your stead.

**🔴 The Sun's Mockery:** Daylight becomes agony, a searing white shroud over your vision in bright light.

</details>


<details>
<summary>🍺 Alcohols 🍺</summary>

# Apple Cider
## Recipe:
A sun-blessed brew, crisp as an autumn morn and sweet as a bard’s love song. Favored by weary travelers and merry villagers alike, its golden hue whispers of ripened apples out in the fields.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Toss in a plump **Apple**, plucked at the peak of juiciness.
- Stir in a pinch of **Sugar** to rouse the sleeping yeasts.
- Finish with a bundle of golden **Wheat**, lending it the heartiness of a harvest feast.
## Effects:
**🟢 Golden Heart:** Gain +2 armor points while holding food of the harvest; it’s warmth strengthening you.

**🟢 Harvest’s Bounty:** Eating food restores +2 extra hunger points and grants +20% movement speed for 30 seconds.

**🟢 Sun-Kissed Vigor:** Passive health regen while under sunlight. The cider carries the warmth of an autumn sun.

**🔴 Sweet Scent:** Bees are drawn to you and may sting, even if unprovoked. The cider’s sweetness lingers on your skin.

# Cactus Tequila
## Recipe:
A scorching amber spirit that dances on the tongue like desert wind over dunes. Caravanners and foolhardy adventurers toast with it, laughing as their lips tingle with ember-sweet rebellion.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Chop in a **Cactus**, its flesh bitter as a bandit’s pride and twice as sharp.
- Stir in a pinch of **Blaze Powder**, stolen from the heart of a Nether ember, to ignite the soul.
- Sweeten with **Sugar**, a golden kiss to tame the flame, lest it burns more than just the tongue.
## Effects:
**🟢 Bandit’s Defiance:** Melee hits after drinking deal +2 extra damage and briefly ignites the target. 

**🟢 Dune Strider:** Movement speed +50% in hot biomes. The desert’s harshness fuels your stride.

**🟡 Prickly Aura:** Passively damage all those nearby. The cactus’s spines don’t discriminate.

# Carrot Wine
## Recipe:
A deceptively noble taste, with earthy sweetness and a luminous glow that dances in the glass like liquid sunset. Beloved by both tipsy tavern-goers and discerning rabbits with a taste for the finer things.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Toss in a **Carrot**, scrubbed clean of the soil’s embrace, its sweetness waiting to awaken.
- Stir in a pinch of **Sugar**, to coax out its hidden nectar and sweeten the deal.
- Finish with a sprinkle of **Glowstone Dust**, igniting the brew with a golden shimmer; as if capturing the last rays of dusk.
## Effects:
**🟢 Earthen Resilience:** Armor toughness +1 when standing on dirt, grass, or farmland. The carrot’s roots tie you to the earth.

**🟢 Luminous Sight:** Gain sight in the dark; the essence of the glowstone improving your sight.

**🟢 Rabbit’s Grace:** Jump higher, +1 blocks, and experience fall damage reduced by 1 heart. The wine carries the lightness of a hare’s leap.

**🔴 Hollowburrow Hunger:** The spirit of the rabbit now burns through you. It eats what you eat, and then some.

# Chorus Fruit Liqueur
## Recipe:
A volatile elixir that dances on the tongue like starlight; one sip may send your spirit soaring or leave you stranded in a haze of regret. Beloved by reckless adventurers and foolhardy sorcerers who dare to gamble with fate.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Crush a **Popped Chorus Fruit**, its fractured whispers fizzing with unstable magic.
- Stir in a heap of **Sugar**, to sweeten the deal... or disguise the danger.
- Drop in an **Ender Pearl**, its dimensional energies infusing the brew with an unsettling but addictive vibration.
## Effects:
**🟢 Chorus Resonance:** Melee attacks chain to 1 nearby enemy. The liqueur sings when you fight.

**🟢 Echoing Evasion:** 10% chance for damage to phase through you harmlessly. Reality glitches around you.

**🟢 Fractured Momentum:** Every 10 seconds, you will teleport to the block you are currently looking at. The liqueur’s magic refuses to let you stand still.

**🔴 The Watchers:** Endermen are drawn to you, instinctively attacking you without being provoked. They know you’ve been tampering.

# Dandelion Gin
## Recipe:
A mischievous elixir, its floral bouquet dances on the tongue before a slow, creeping warmth reminds you that some beauties bite back. Favored by rogue alchemists and those who like their drinks with a whisper of danger.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Pluck a **Dandelion**, sun-drunk and puffing with pollen, and drop it in without a second thought.
- Add a **Spider Eye**, glistening with venomous charm, for a medicinal aftertaste that lingers like a whispered secret.
- **Sugar** to mask the bite, a generous pour, like bribing a trickster spirit.
## Effects:
**🟢 Pollen’s Grace:** Jump higher, +1 blocks, and experience fall damage reduced by 1 heart. The dandelion’s lightness lingers in your bones.

**🟢 Solar Flare:** When hit below half health, release a burst of light, blinding nearby enemies for 2 seconds. The dandelion remembers the sun’s wrath.

**🟢 Venom’s Kiss:** Your melee attacks poison enemies for 3 seconds. The spider’s bite hides in every sip.

**🔴 Insect’s Grudge:** Silverfish and spiders deal increased damage to you. The spider eye in the gin calls its kin.

# Dragon’s Breath Brandy
## Recipe:
A scorching elixir that dances on the tongue like a wyrm’s last laugh; this molten amber spirit is liquid courage with teeth. Only foolish adventurers dare sip it, for its embered aftertaste lingers long after the bottle’s empty.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Toss in a splash of **Dragon’s Breath**, stolen from the maw of The End’s great beast.
- Stir in a heap of **Sugar**, a desperate plea to spare your throat from cinders.
- Finish with a **Nether Wart**, its cursed roots weaving the flames into something barely drinkable.
## Effects:
**🟢 Cinder Tongue:** Spit out a constant stream of flames whilst sneaking. The brandy fights its way back out.

**🟢 Scorched Hide:** Fire damage has no impact on you. Your blood burns too hot to be harmed.

**🟢 Wyrm’s Heart:** Your fists and melee weapons ignite enemies for 3 seconds. The brandy’s fire lives in your veins.

**🔴 Thirst of the Pyre:** Water contact deals significant damage. Your body rejects moisture.

# Ghastly Gin
## Recipe:
A spirit as pale as a wraith’s sigh, distilled from tears. Hauntingly smooth, it leaves a chill like a specter’s touch; favored by heartbroken poets, reckless adventurers, and those who laugh a little too loudly in empty taverns.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Drop in a **Ghast Tear**, shimmering with the sorrow of the Nether’s lost souls.
- Stir in a pinch of **Sugar**, a fleeting attempt to sweeten the bitterness of fate.
- Finish with a **Fermented Spider Eye**, its murky depths swirling with lingering regret.
## Effects:
**🟢 Chill of the Departed:** Gain immunity to fire, your skin grows cold to the touch. The Nether’s sorrows dampen flames.

**🟢 Wraith’s Whisper:** 10% chance for damage to phase through you harmlessly. The gin’s spectral nature lets you flicker like a ghost.

# Gilded Absinthe
## Recipe:
The drink of poets and fools; one sip, and the world unravels in emerald dreams. A shimmering, venomous green elixir that dances between delirium and delight, cherished by mad artists and those who dare to peer beyond the veil.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Drop in a **Golden Apple**, its gilded skin hiding nectar fit for kings.
- Stir in a pinch of **Sugar**, a stolen spark of sweetness to lure the unwary.
- Finish with a **Fermented Spider Eye**, its cursed tang twisting the brew into something wicked and wonderful.
## Effects:
**🟢 Ambrosial Sip:** Eating food restores +4 extra hunger points and grants absorption.

**🟢 Gilded Resilience:** Gain +10 health. The gold in your veins hardens against fate.

**🟢 Sun-Kissed Flesh:** Gain health regeneration when entering sunlight. The apple’s divine energy lingers.

**🔴 Midas’ Folly:** Your gilded flesh stills your movement, moving 25% slower. The gilding is unstable.

# Glow Berry Champagne
## Recipe:
A mischievous brew that sparkles like starlight caught in a glass. Its radiant bubbles dance with every sip, leaving a faint luminescence on the lips, perfect for toasting triumphs. Favored by adventurers who laugh in the face of danger.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Crush **Glow Berries** into the keg, their bioluminescent juices swirling like captured fairy lights.
- Stir in **Sugar**, coaxing the mixture into a frenzy of sweet, shimmering bubbles.
- Finish with a dash of **Gunpowder**, because why settle for fizz when you can have fireworks on the tongue?
## Effects:
**🟢 Firework Blood:** Taking damage causes a burst of colored sparks, briefly blinding attackers. Your veins run with celebratory defiance.

**🟢 Starlight Sip:** Gain sight in the dark. The champagne’s glow illuminating the dark.

**🟡 Firework Belly:** Release explosions over time, harmless to you, but hurting those around you. The gunpowder remembers its purpose.

# Honey Mead
## Recipe:
The nectar of the gods, if gods were tipsy bees. Golden and ambrosial, this drink hums with the lazy warmth of a midsummer hive. Beloved by bards, beekeepers, and those who fancy themselves part of a very drunk pantheon.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Pour in a **Honey Bottle**, its contents stolen from a hive drowsy with sunlight.
- Stir in a pinch of **Sugar**, a spark of mortal greed to out-sweeten nature itself.
- Toss in a proud stalk of **Wheat**, for a rustic whisper of the harvest’s embrace.
## Effects:
**🟢 Ambrosial Aura:** Nearby allies gain regeneration while standing close to you. The mead’s golden warmth radiates like a beehive’s hum.

**🟢 Hive’s Blessing:** Bees ignore you as they falsely recognize you as one of their own.

**🟢 Honeyed Words:** Villagers offer better trades. The mead’s sweetness makes you charming.

**🔴 Honeyed Sloth:** You find yourself unable to sprint. The mead’s drowsy warmth makes haste feel vulgar.

# Magma Mead
## Recipe:
This searing concoction bubbles like molten rock and burns with the fury of the Nether itself. Only the foolhardy, or those with fireproof gullets, dare take a sip. Its amber glow pulses like embers, and the aftertaste lingers like a dragon’s breath.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Stir in a glob of **Magma Cream**, its viscous fire begging to be unleashed.
- Toss in a heap of **Sugar**, a fleeting illusion of sweetness before the inferno claims your tongue.
- Finish with **Blaze Powder**, ensuring each sip burns twice, once going down, and once in your guts.
## Effects:
**🟢 Molten Momentum:** Movement speed +50%. The ground remembers your passing.

**🟢 Netherforged Skin:** Gain immunity to fire. Your veins run with liquid embers.

**🟢 Scorched Presence:** Mobs that you touch or touch you ignite. The mead’s fury seeps from your pores.

**🔴 Nether’s Claim:** If you die while the mead is active, your corpse explodes. The Nether reclaims its gifts violently.

# Nether Wart Rum
## Recipe:
A devil’s draught, dark as a soul forfeit and spiced like a smuggler’s last confession. Pirates weep for this recipe, not from sorrow, but from the fire that lingers long after the bottle’s drained. Only the reckless or the doomed dare drink it.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Toss in a fistful of **Nether Wart**, plucked from the ashen soil where shadows whisper.
- Stir in a heap of **Sugar**, a coward’s attempt to mask the sin before it sears your throat.
- Finish with **Blaze Powder**, because hell should burn twice, and so should you.
## Effects:
**🟢 Blighted Strikes:** Melee attacks apply withering to non-undead enemies. Your blows carry the fortress’s rot.

**🟢 Fortress Scent:** Creatures of the Nether Fortress ignore you presence unless provoked. You reek of netherwart and ash, they mistake you for part of the ruins.

**🟢 Wither’s Endurance:** Gain +10 health while in the Nether. The fortress’s curse lends you its stubborn defiance.

**🔴 Hollowing:** Take damage over time when outside the Nether. The rum’s power fades, leaving your body to crumble like netherrack.

# Phantom Gin
## Recipe:
Bottled insomnia. One sip, and you’ll never sleep again. This pale, ghostly spirit flickers like a dying lantern, its taste sharp as a specter’s whisper. Favored by thieves, scholars burning midnight oil, and fools who dare to outwit the dawn.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Fold in a **Phantom Membrane**, harvested fresh from the clutches of nightmares.
- Stir in a pinch of **Sugar**, to sweeten the terrors lurking within.
- Drop in a **Fermented Spider Eye**, for fear is bitter.
## Effects:
**🟢 Phantom’s Gaze:** Gain sight in the dark; the eyes of the phantom becoming yours.

**🟢 Phantom’s Grace:** Movement speed +50% at night. The restless dead lend you their haste.

**🟢Specter’s Grasp:** Melee strikes inflict levitation; your blows carry the weightless dread of the night, sending foes drifting upward like lost spirits.

**🔴 Sleepless Debt:** You cannot sleep in beds. The Tavern claims your rest as payment.

# Potato Vodka
## Recipe:
Clear as a mountain glacier and strong enough to knock a giant off its feet. This unpretentious spirit is the liquid courage of miners, mercenaries, and those who’d rather forget their troubles.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Toss in a stout **Potato**, rugged and unpeeled, as rough-handed as the miners who prize it.
- Stir in a pinch of **Sugar**, a sly thief’s trick to smooth the edge off a thief’s regret.
- Finish with a proud stalk of **Wheat**, lending a whisper of golden fields to the otherwise unrepentant burn.
## Effects:
**🟢 Glacial Numbness:** Take 30% less damage from all sources. The vodka dulls pain as easily as it dulls regrets.

**🟢 Miner’s Resolve:** Mining speed increases by 50%. The spirit of stubborn toil lingers in every sip.

**🟢 Swing First, Think Never:** Melee attacks deal +4 damage. Your drunken stupor increases your strength.

**🔴 Reversal:** Upon killing an enemy, you will take damage. The Tavern collects its debt in blood.

# Pufferfish Punch
## Recipe:
A drink as daring as a pirate’s last gamble, its venomous bite tempered into a tingling thrill. Only the foolhardy or the truly desperate dare to sip, but those who survive swear it grants visions of the ocean’s deepest secrets. Favored by rogue alchemists and thrill-seeking sailors.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Toss in a **Pufferfish**, its spines still whispering of the reef’s deadly embrace.
- Stir in a pinch of **Sugar**, a sweet lie to soothe the creeping numbness.
- Finish with a **Slimeball**, its ooze thickening the brew into something dubiously drinkable.
## Effects:
**🟢 Nimble Float:** Jump higher, +1 blocks, and experience fall damage reduced by 1 heart. 

**🟢 Venom’s Kiss:** Melee attacks poison enemies for 3 seconds. The punch’s toxins linger in your blood.

**🟢 Water Adaptation:** Breath in water as easily as you would in air. The gills of the pufferfish infusing oxygen into you.

**🔴 Toxin Tremors:** Burn through your hunger faster, requiring more food intake. Your stomach fights the lingering poison.

# Pumpkin Spice Liqueur
## Recipe:
Autumn in a bottle, swirling with the warmth of crackling hearths and whispered incantations. Its golden-amber glow holds the essence of fallen leaves and candlelit covens. Beloved by witches and pumpkin-patch wanderers alike.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Drop in a **Carved Pumpkin**, its flesh scooped bare to better steep its earthy sweetness.
- Stir in a heap of **Sugar**, like a coven’s blessing to tempt the tongue.
- Finish with a humble **Stick**, charmed near enough to cinnamon to fool the senses.
## Effects:
**🟢 Moonlit Brew:** Movement speed +50% at night. The coven’s magic stirs under moonlight.

**🟢 Moonlit Vigor:** Melee damage +50% at night. The witches smile as their brew fuels your violence.

**🟢 Spiced Blood:** Gain immunity to fire; the spices in your veins gently increasing your heat tolerance.

**🔴 Sugar Crash:** Burn through your hunger faster, requiring more food intake. The sweetness fades, leaving you emptier than before.

# Redstone Rum
## Recipe:
A volatile concoction that hums with raw energy, crackling on the tongue like a misfired piston. Engineers swear by its electrifying buzz, while madmen chase the phantom sparks dancing behind their eyelids. One sip, and your veins might just light up like a redstone circuit.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Stir in a pile of **Redstone Dust**, pulsing with untamed power.
- Sweeten with **Sugar**, because even lightning craves a little indulgence.
- Toss in **Glowstone Dust**, in case all of that energy wouldn’t have you glowing already.
## Effects:
**🟢 Energy Surge:** Your hunger does not drain. The rum burns calories for you.

**🟢 Overclocked Reflexes:** Break blockers 50% faster. Your muscles twitch with redstone’s rhythm.

**🟢 Overclocked Sight:** Gain sight in the dark; the essence of the glowstone improving your sight.

**🔴 Jittery Hands:** Cannot hold a steady crosshair; your fingers buzz too much for precision.

# Slimeball Shots
## Recipe:
A murky, wobbling concoction that clings to the glass, and your regrets. Its eye-watering sourness and dubious texture make it a rite of passage for reckless adventurers and masochistic alchemists. The aftertaste lingers like a curse.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Drop in a **Slimeball**, still quivering with residual malice.
- Toss in a heap of **Sugar**, a futile attempt to mask the inevitable suffering.
- Finish with a **Fermented Spider Eye**, because true despair requires depth.
## Effects:
**🟢 Skyward Strike:** Deal +20% melee damage while airborne. The slime’s residual bounce fuels your momentum.

**🟢 Slime-Launched:** Jump higher, +1 blocks, and experience fall damage reduced by 1 heart. 

**🔴 Ground Penalty:** Find yourself heavily slowed while on the ground. Your skin oozes a tar like substance, making ground movement a pain.

# Sweet Berry Wine
## Recipe:
A drink of summer love and poor life choices. Its ruby hue winks like a rogue’s promise, too sweet to resist and too bright to forget. Gulped down by starry-eyed dreamers and reckless adventurers, it leaves lips stained and memories hazier than twilight.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Crush in a handful of **Sweet Berries**, bursting with the reckless joy of sun-drunk afternoons.
- Stir in a heap of **Sugar**, to speed up tomorrow’s regret.
- Drop in a few **Glow Berries**, because even mistakes should glitter like fool’s gold.
## Effects:
**🟢 Berry-Blessed:** Eating any berry restores +4 hunger points and grants 5 seconds of +75% movement speed. The wine enhances its own tastes.

**🟢 Fool’s Glow:** Gain sight in the dark, as well as glowing. Even in darkness, your poor choices shine.

**🟢 Stolen Kiss:** Your attacks inflict weakness. The wine’s sweetness lingers like a lover’s touch.

**🔴 First Heartbreak:** Lose 4 health while active. The wine’s sweetness curdles into something hollow.

# Wheat Beer
## Recipe:
A simple, hearty brew, as reliable as a farmer’s calloused hands and as comforting as a hearthfire’s glow. Beloved by villagers and adventurers alike, its golden-amber depths carry the warmth of sunlit fields and the faint whisper of earthy fermentation.
- Begin by prepping your **Keg** with a **Bottle of Water**.
- Toss in a bundle of **Wheat**, harvested at dawn when the stalks still cling to the morning’s dew.
- Drop in a **Brown Mushroom**, its hidden spores lending a burst of wild yeast.
- Stir in a pinch of **Sugar**, just enough to rouse the drowsing fungi into a merry, bubbling dance.
## Effects:
**🟢 Earthy Resilience:** Gain +30% resistance to all damage; your body absorb damage like packed soil.

**🟢 Harvest’s Stamina:** Your hunger does not drain. The beer fuels endurance like a farmer’s steady labor.

**🟢 Village Favor:** Villagers offer better trades. They trust a fellow wheat enthusiast.

**🔴 Plowman’s Burden:** Your legs refuse to hurry, sprinting is impossible. Your legs exhausted from the fields.

</details>


[If you have any questions, concerns, or bugs you would like to report, my Discord server is a great place for doing so.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)
